'''gawïfdïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okurigana|okurigana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okurigana|okurigana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| gawïfdïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gæwïfdïfth || gæwïfdïfj || gæwïfdïfsh || gæwïfdïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gawïfwïfdïfth || gawïfwïfdïfj || gawïfwïfdïfsh || gawïfwïfdïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gawïfdïfth || gawïfdïfj || gawïfdïfsh || gawïfdïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gawïffdïffth || gawïffdïffj || gawïffdïffsh || gawïffdïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gawïfdïfïf || gawïfdïfïf || gawïfdïfïf || gawïfdïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || gawïfdïfth || gawïfdïfj || gawïfdïfsh || gawïfdïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gawïfdïfïfl || gawïfdïfïfl || gawïfdïfïfl || gawïfdïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gawïfdïfïfïf || gawïfdïfïfïf || gawïfdïfïfïf || gawïfdïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || gawïfdïfïfn || gawïfdïfïfn || gawïfdïfïfn || gawïfdïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gawïfdïfïforo || gawïfdïfïforo || gawïfdïfïforo || gawïfdïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
